message:
fix(extensions): resolve clippy lints from SEC-3.3A explanation additions

- Add const fn to ExecMediationPolicy::strict/permissive and two risk helpers
- Use char pattern instead of single-character string in classify_fork_bomb
- Allow too_many_arguments/too_many_lines on runtime_risk_build_explanation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
